motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def latestTimeCatchTheBus(self, buses: List[int], passengers: List[int], capacity: int) -> int:
        buses.sort()
        passengers.sort()
        n, m = len(buses), len(passengers)
        i, j = 0, 0
        ans = 0
        while i < n and j < m:
            waiting = []
            while j < m and passengers[j] <= buses[i]:
                waiting.append(passengers[j])
                j += 1
            waiting.sort()
            if len(waiting) <= capacity:
                ans = max(ans, buses[i])
                i += 1
            else:
                ans = max(ans, waiting[capacity - 1] + (buses[i] - waiting[capacity - 1]) % (capacity - len(waiting) + 1))
                i += 1
        return ans
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O((n + m) log(n + m))
space complexity: O(m)
energy implications: MEDIUM
